headline: Domestic violence reports rise 23% but convictions stagnate
context: Police received 8,400 domestic violence reports in 2024, a 23% increase from 2023, while conviction rates remained at 12%.

cards.big: 8,400 domestic violence reports in 2024 but only 12% conviction rate
cards.sub: Reporting increases have not translated into justice for survivors

cards.big: Domestic Violence Act 1994 amended in 2017 expanded definition of abuse
cards.sub: Emotional and financial abuse now included but rarely prosecuted separately

cards.big: Malaysia committed to SDG 5 target of eliminating violence against women by 2030
cards.sub: Current trajectory makes 2030 target unachievable per UN Women assessment

cards.big: Only 45 shelters nationwide serve 32 million population as of 2025
cards.sub: Rural women face average 3-hour travel time to nearest shelter facility

cards.big: A 12% conviction rate sends a message that violence carries few consequences
WAO handled 4,200 crisis calls in 2024, double pre-pandemic levels
